app.name: Business Metrics Discovery
app.description: A starting project with routing, fetching data, and charting

scopes.name: storage:metrics:read
scopes.comment: read dt.service.request.count and other service metrics for OneAgent service listing

scopes.name: storage:spans:read
scopes.comment: read distributed trace spans for OpenTelemetry method discovery

scopes.name: storage:entities:read
scopes.comment: resolve service entity names from IDs

scopes.name: storage:bizevents:read
scopes.comment: read captured business events for live parameter discovery

scopes.name: settings:objects:read
scopes.comment: read existing business event capture rules

scopes.name: settings:schemas:read
scopes.comment: discover available settings schemas at runtime

scopes.name: document:documents:write
scopes.comment: create dashboards directly on the tenant from the Journey Wizard

scopes.name: ReadConfig
scopes.comment: read v1 Config API for request attributes list
